title: GoldWing Squadron
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''GoldWing Squadron''' was a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/In starfighters]] that served the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Stationed aboard [[Station 2LC/Blue]] along with [[SilverWing Squadron]], it formed part of that station's [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison based on [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1998-04-XX -->''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''
